title: Maestro Board
description: Canonical schema for board/data.json. Epics group work; tickets are the unit of delivery and route themselves to an agent pipeline and a model tier.

epicId.description: The epic this ticket belongs to.

desc.description: Short source of truth. Longer specs live in board/specs/<id>.md.

area.description: Part of the system (backend/frontend/infra/docs...). Sets area defaults like model floor and test command.

depends_on.description: This ticket is eligible only when all referenced tickets are done.

agent_plan.description: Ordered pipeline of agent codes, e.g. ["pe","backend","qa","merge"]. Terminal gates (qa, pd, merge) are appended automatically if absent.

model.description: Model tier to run this ticket's stages on. See docs/MODEL-ROUTING.md.

wave.description: Optional ordering hint for batched runs.

agent.description: Human-readable display label (e.g. 'PE+QA'). Not used for execution — agent_plan is.

human_gate.description: When set, the orchestrator never auto-picks this ticket; a human must clear it. Value should come from the project's configured humanGates vocabulary.

testCmd.description: Optional ticket-specific test command that overrides the area default in the release gate.

evidence.description: Verification evidence recorded when the ticket is completed (commit SHA, test output, etc.).
